title: allium sphaerocephalon var. scaberrimum
intro: Allium sphaerocephalon var. scaberrimum is a lesser-known variant of the globe thistle or round-headed onion, a perennial plant native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its spherical purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, teas, and infusions, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
